creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Add ports for linux-f10-[alsa|pulseaudio]

http://ns.ael.ru/~fluffy.khv/ports/linux-audio.tar.bz2

core modules also added to Mk/bsd.linux-apps.mk (patch included to tarball)

New ports: 

linux-f10-alsa-plugins-oss                                                                                                                                             
linux-f10-alsa-plugins-pulseaudio                                                                                                                                      
linux-f10-pulseaudio                                                                                                                                                   
linux-f10-pulseaudio-core-libs                                                                                                                                         
linux-f10-pulseaudio-esound-compat                                                                                                                                     
linux-f10-pulseaudio-libs                                                                                                                                              
linux-f10-pulseaudio-libs-glib2                                                                                                                                        
linux-f10-pulseaudio-libs-zeroconf
